text:
- Use WWWDIR
- Use FETCH_ARGS instead of FETCH_CMD
- Drop MD5 checksum from distinfo
- Move pkg-message to files/pkg-message.in
- Fix pkg-plist
- Make portlint happier
- Bump PORTREVISION

- files/pkg-message.in

Removed file(s):
- pkg-message

Port maintainer (nivit@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
